notes: The installed official MCP path has previously timed out on tools/call while Studio still executed the command.
The repo-local legacy bridge receives the response body and is the current reliable automation path.

repo_updates_made: src/CellExperience/Data/NucleusMeshAssets.lua now records the connected Studio asset ids for the imported shell and pore gate ring.
tools/deploy_nucleus_mesh_experience.py now supports --legacy-bridge for the currently connected Studio plugin.
tools/deploy_nucleus_mesh_experience.py now fails clearly when the old OBJ source directory is missing instead of silently proceeding.
roblox_experiences/nucleus_mesh_experience/README.md documents the legacy bridge deploy option.
Phase 07R group-level FBX package exports now exist under organelles/nucleus/exports/phase_07r_roblox.
organelles/nucleus/exports/nucleus_phase_07r_roblox_asset_manifest.json now records the production Open Cloud package plan.

official_roblox_import_path.summary: Export grouped FBX/OBJ/glTF assets from Blender, import them with Roblox Studio's 3D Importer, then paste the resulting mesh asset ids into a Lua asset manifest and assemble them in Luau.
why: Roblox Studio imports third-party mesh files as Roblox mesh assets; game scripts should assemble already-imported assets rather than reading local .blend/.fbx/.obj files at runtime.
Asset ids are stable enough for scripted assembly and review, while local Blender files remain the art source.

local_automation_import_path.summary: The standalone prototype can read local OBJ files, inline vertex/face tables, and create EditableMesh MeshParts in Studio through the bridge.
local_automation_import_path.current_blocker: organelle_projects/04_nucleus/assets/mesh is currently missing, so tools/deploy_nucleus_mesh_experience.py cannot build its EditableMesh payload until those OBJ files are regenerated or the deploy path is redirected to new nucleus export files.

missing_items: Open Cloud upload has not been run because ROBLOX_OPEN_CLOUD_API_KEY and ROBLOX_GROUP_ID are not present in this shell.
No current Roblox package asset ids have been written for Phase 07R group packages.
Rough ER ribbons and lumen transparency still need Roblox Studio material fallback validation after package insertion.

next_recommended_actions: Run tools/upload_nucleus_phase07r_open_cloud_assets.py after setting ROBLOX_OPEN_CLOUD_API_KEY and ROBLOX_GROUP_ID.
Poll Open Cloud upload operations and write package asset ids into nucleus_phase_07r_roblox_asset_manifest.json.
Run tools/assemble_nucleus_phase07r_packages_in_studio.py --legacy-bridge after package ids are present.
Use the legacy bridge only for Studio assembly/probe scripts until the official MCP/plugin response mismatch is resolved.
Validate imported Phase 07R rough ER transparency and lumen ribbons in Studio before marking Roblox export ready.
